source.title: Surgical site infections: prevention and treatment — Recommendations
source.population: Adults, young people, and children having a surgical procedure involving a skin incision.
source.setting: Perioperative, postoperative, community, and specialist wound-care services.
source.exclusions: Exact for postoperative wound-care and surgical-site-infection documentation; partial for traumatic wounds, suture removal, and UAE pathways.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines the postoperative surgical-wound population and supports wound dressing, cleansing, wound-healing, and structured postoperative wound-care documentation.

source.title: Joint replacement (primary): hip, knee and shoulder — Recommendations
source.population: Adults having primary elective hip, knee, or shoulder replacement.
source.setting: Primary, secondary, and tertiary services before and after elective joint replacement.
source.exclusions: Exact for primary elective joint-replacement information and rehabilitation; partial for a generic orthopaedic postoperative workflow and not validated for UAE pathways.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documentation of postoperative pain, wound care, recovery, rehabilitation, return to work or activity, concerns, questions, and procedure-specific information.

assessment.text: Supports orthopaedic review for new or worsening pain, limp, or loss of function related to a joint replacement while noting the absence of a general fixed monitoring schedule.

source.title: Joint replacement (primary): hip, knee and shoulder — Recommendations

assessment.text: Supports clinician-documented mobility, activities of daily living, rehabilitation goals, self-directed or supervised rehabilitation, functional impairment, and physiotherapy or occupational-therapy follow-up.
